titleStmt.title: SII 28.302: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 302. (A.R. No. 456 of 1913.) TAḌĀVŪR, ATTUR TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription records a royal order addressed to Vilāḍarāyar and purvariyār for their execution, to the effect that the land called uḍai-kuḷam alias vīra-māgadhaṉ-ēndal and the surrounding dry crop land (puñchey) west of the channel (nīr-kōvai) from the big lake of Vīra-chōḻanallūr, along with (entitlement to ?) the taxes (āyam), poṉvari, kāśāyam, kāttikai-ppachchai, mātru-chānti, ūśivāśi, nall-ērudu, naṟ-ppaśu etc. as also āḷ-amaiñji-tēvai had been granted to God Tiruvēkambamuḍaiya-nāyaṉār of Tiḍāvūr as dēvadāna-iṟaili (tax-free land granted to God).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ § vilāṭarāyarum puravariyārum ceyyakkaṭavapaṭi tiṭāvūr Uṭaiyār tiruvekampamu
ṭaiya nāyaṉārkku vīracoḻa nallūril periyeri nīrkovaikku meṟku Uṭai
kuḷamāṉa vīramākataṉ Entalum Ivvental cūḻnta puṉceyum poṉvari
kācāyam kāttikaippaccai mātirucānti Ūcivāci nallerutu naṟpacu Uḷḷiṭṭa Aṉai
ttāyaṅkaḷum Āḷamaiñcitevaiyum Uḷppaṭa Oṉpatāvatu mutal cantirātittavaraiyum te
vatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyākak kuṭuttom Ippaṭi kaṇakkil niṟuttik kuṭuṭu written above the line.ppate Ivai tāilunalla
perumāḷ Eḻuttu § Ivai viḻuppātarāyaṉ Eḻuttu śrīmāheśvara rakṣai ḥ §
Digital edition of SII 28.302 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
